title: How a man of God becomes worth marrying
caption:
The guy desperate for a wife reeks of it. She can tell.

The problem was never that you weren't ready to find her. The problem is that most men are chasing the relationship instead of chasing God — and God made you in the wrong order.

Stop performing for an audience of one. Build your identity from the one who actually knows you. Become the man in private, and let the rest be added.

"Seek first the kingdom of God, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33

Save this for the brother still chasing what he should be becoming.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #christianity #scripture #relationships
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
